name: Aircraft Structural Components
description: Airframe structural parts, bulkheads, ribs, spars, and skin panels for fixed-wing aircraft.

name: Aircraft Components & Accessories
description: Flight controls, landing gear components, hydraulic actuators, and airframe accessories.

name: Gas Turbines & Jet Engines
description: Turbine blades, combustion chambers, compressor stages, and complete engine modules.

name: Engine Accessories
description: Fuel controls, oil pumps, starters, ignition systems, and engine-mounted accessories.

name: Bearings
description: Ball bearings, roller bearings, thrust bearings, and bearing assemblies for aerospace applications.

name: Hardware & Abrasives
description: Aerospace-grade fasteners, bolts, nuts, washers, rivets, and precision hardware.

name: Electronic Components
description: Avionics circuit boards, sensors, transistors, capacitors, and electronic sub-assemblies.

name: Wire & Power Distribution
description: Mil-spec wire, cable assemblies, harnesses, connectors, and power distribution units.

name: Fire Control Equipment
description: Fire control computers, radar components, weapon system electronics, and targeting assemblies.

name: Lighting Fixtures & Lamps
description: Aircraft interior and exterior lighting, position lights, anti-collision lights, and landing lights.
